## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:unit:ci` passes (Mongo available for integration tests)
- [ ] `npm run test:frontend` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:locales` passes (if i18n touched)
- [ ] OpenAPI updated in `docs/openapi.json` (if API changed)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
